summary: Comprehensive testing of new SeguriTurno features completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly including shift templates, company selector, split shifts, symbols, and comment indicators.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)

action_items: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility compliance (LOW priority)
seed_data_creation: Test user guardia_test@test.com with shifts, templates, and company data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Shift Templates CRUD - create/read/update/delete templates with split shift support, 2) Companies - 2 companies per user with independent calendars, 3) Split Shifts - turno partido with start_time_2/end_time_2 saves and displays correctly, 4) Company filtering - shifts filtered by company_id, 5) Symbols - custom symbols on shifts, 6) Comment indicators - visible in calendar cells. Test user: guardia_test@test.com / Test1234!

shift_templates.POST /api/shift-templates: PASS - creates template with all fields

companies.GET /api/companies: PASS - creates 2 default companies if none exist

split_shifts.POST /api/shifts with start_time_2/end_t: PASS - creates split shift with correct total_hours calculation
split_shifts.total_hours calculation: PASS - correctly sums both shift periods (4h + 4h = 8h)

company_filtering.company_independence: PASS - shifts from different companies are independent

payroll.GET /api/payroll/{year}/{month}?company_: PASS - calculates payroll for specific company

frontend.company_selector: PASS - switches between companies, shows independent calendars
frontend.quick_apply_bar: PASS - shows templates, click to select, click day to apply
frontend.shift_modal: PASS - all fields present including turno partido toggle
frontend.turno_partido_toggle: PASS - shows/hides second shift time inputs
frontend.split_shift_display: PASS - shows both time ranges in calendar cell (08:00-14:00 / +18:00-22:00)
frontend.comment_indicator: PASS - MessageSquare icon visible on cells with comments
